opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I have these huge, spreading red rings all over my stomach and arms. They itch so intensely I can't sleep, and they are growing bigger every day.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Rapidly spreading, intensely itchy red rings on my trunk and arm.

symptom_narrative.onset: small itchy spots 7 days ago, now spreading rings
symptom_narrative.character: red rings with a scaly raised edge and a clearer centre; very itchy
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: grows outward daily, worse at night/sweating
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: sweating, night; a steroid cream made it spread
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: raised scaly edges with tiny pustules; smooth centres; no fever

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: OTC hydrocortisone cream (used 2 days; seemed to make it spread)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: adopted a rescue kitten 2 weeks ago

communication_style.typical_message_style: worried about a spreading serious infection

objective_data_offered.value: several 3-6cm red rings on the belly and left forearm with a raised scaly outer edge and a clearer smooth centre; a few tiny pustules on the biggest ring's edge; no lumps/warmth
